videos.headline: LSU's Trey'Dez Green on dominant performance in win over South Carolina
videos.description: The ultimate team player, Green, expresses his trust in Tigers' QB Garrett Nussmeier after grabbing some ridiculous catches and destroying one-on-one coverages vs. the Gamecocks.

videos.headline: No. 11 LSU's Brian Kelly expresses his concerns in win over South Carolina
videos.description: Kelly states he is happy to come out of an SEC matchup with a win, but says there is much to improve on as they look ahead to the rest of the season after beating the Gamecocks.
